examples: It had been discovered that the book was a palimpsest, and beneath the surface writing of the manuscript laid, guess what?
It wasn't until 1906 that a scholar came across the prayer book in a library and realized it was a palimpsest, and that the underlying layer of texts could only have come from Archimedes.
The palimpsest then went through some more tough times, but eventually it ended up in an art auction where was bought and then donated to an art museum in Baltimore, for conservation and study.
Like everything in central Rome, it is a palimpsest, layers of writing and meaning on top of, or at least next to, others.
Each institution has been given five of the palimpsest's 170 pages.
